name: follow-the-money
description: Visualize circular funding loops between Canadian charities using CRA T3010 data

scripts.start: npm run kill --silent && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "node server.js" "npm run client"
scripts.old:
npm run kill --silent && echo '
→ Old UI: http://localhost:3000/old.html
→ Entities: http://localhost:3000/entities.html
' && node server.js
